steps.title: Use the colon
steps.content: The colon explains Steiger Butte Drum's role: members helped compose the work and must be included in every performance. That explanation shows that their participation is essential, not minor or merely related.

steps.title: Match the essential role
steps.content: A means peripheral, B describes something later in time, and C means similar or comparable. The needed word describes something fundamental to the piece's creation and performance. The answer is D.
